chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P No.S-39 of 2021 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of Main Case. 16.02.2021 Mr. Tahir Hussain Meo, Advocate along with Petitioners. Mr. Talib Ali Memon, Assistant P.G, Sindh. Ms. Naushaba Haq Solangi, Asst. A.G, Sindh along with SIP Akhtiar Hussain Shaikh of P.S B-Section, Shahdadkot and ASI Ghulam Mustafa Seelro, of P.S A-Section, Shahdadkot. -x-x-x-x-x- Learned Assistant A.G, Sindh files statements on behalf of respondents No. 3 & 4, same being self-explanatory are hereby taken on record. Mr. Abdul Nabi Joyo, Advocate files his Vakalatnama on behalf of Respondent No.5. Meanwhile, Mr. Shahid Hussain Kalhoro, Advocate, also files his Vakalatnama on behalf of Respondents No.6, 7 and 10, same are hereby taken on record. Both the learned counsel for respondents submit that neither they have harassed the petitioner nor will harass her in future. As far as her action of contracting or entering into Nikkah is concerned, they have no objection. Learned counsel for the petitioner, in view of above development, shows his satisfaction and seeks disposal of the petition and submits that legal protection may be provided to the petitioners. Learned Assistant A.G, Sindh as well as Assistant P.G, Sindh undertake to direct official respondents to provide legal protection to the couple and to act strictly in accordance with law. In view of above, instant petition is hereby disposed of along with pending application(s). Let copy of this order be communicated to respondent No.2 to 4, for compliance.
In view of above, instant petition is hereby disposed of along with pending application(s). Let copy of this order be communicated to respondent No.2 to 4, for compliance. JUDGE Zulfiqar/P.A
